Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to inform email content.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the AI-generated email and sends it to the configured R1 Concepts contact lists via the Marketing Email API.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current DFC product lines, friction compound details, and active promotions to ground email content in real data.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email with subject line, persuasive body copy, and CTAs specifically branded for Dynamic Friction Company.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the generated DFC marketing email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer message, order details, and ticket metadata.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored in HubSpot.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently under development with connections to be determined.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes discovered creator profiles for relevance, audience fit, and content quality relative to the target brand or campaign.

Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective shortlist of creator candidates, enabling marketing teams to prioritize outreach with confidence and cut qualification time.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves qualified creator lists and previously learned outreach sequences and prompt templates stored in Drive.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts a contextual negotiation response using learned conversation patterns and the current thread details.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling product launch copy and monthly recap email content based on new product data and campaign context.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth data, and email performance statistics for the reporting period.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer orders, purchase history, and product-level revenue figures.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates long-form B2B SEO blog content targeting DFC's core audiences: shops, distributors, and fleets, using keyword-optimized prompts.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style content, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and retrieves vehicle specs and history from Wikipedia to build a rich research package for the target vehicle.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantities, on-order records, and in-transit shipment data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen individual manual lookups with a single automated pull, giving the whole team a consistent, real-time view of part availability.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report, enriching each line item and flagging any parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable, enriched report that instantly shows which orders can be fulfilled and which need escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected orders, pre-populated with the relevant status, estimated timelines, and any dead-end part alerts.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time spent writing individual customer updates from hours to seconds, while ensuring every customer gets a timely, accurate message.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all available two-piece rotor products.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects comprehensive competitor catalog data automatically, removing the need for anyone to manually browse and transcribe three separate vendor sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps in coverage and gaps where DFC has no competing product.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Immediately reveals where DFC is uncompetitive or missing market opportunities, giving Dino a prioritized list of potential product expansions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers or contacts to gather demand signal data for two-piece rotor fitments currently absent from DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand intelligence without requiring manual outreach effort, so product decisions are backed by actual customer interest rather than assumptions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and incoming demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one clean, consolidated view of the entire two-piece rotor landscape without having to touch any of the underlying data sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields to extract the full text content of every running ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility across every live ad without requiring someone to manually open and review each one in the platform.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all extracted ad copy for specified phrases or patterns and returns a flagged list identifying the exact ad, field, and matching text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces compliance risks or policy violations in seconds across an entire ad account, replacing a manual review process that could take hours.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted report listing every flagged ad with the specific field, exact copy excerpt, and platform source for each phrase match found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a complete, actionable audit result directly to the right person so issues can be reviewed and resolved without anyone navigating the ad platforms manually.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Pulls live performance data, active ad copy, creative details, and campaign metrics from both Meta and TikTok ad accounts as the data source for the chatbot.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives the chatbot real-time access to the full state of paid channel activity, so answers are always based on current data rather than stale exports.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Interprets natural language questions about paid channel performance and responds with data-grounded answers, summaries, or recommendations drawn from the live Meta and TikTok data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Lets any team member get instant, accurate answers about paid ad performance without needing platform access or knowing how to pull reports.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications and extracts the applicant's email, message, and any attached resume files.
Resume Bot.impact: Catches every inbound application automatically, ensuring no candidate is missed due to inbox volume or manual triage delays.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF into an organized folder structure in Drive, ensuring a permanent, accessible record of every applicant file.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates attachment hunting in email threads and gives the hiring team a clean, searchable archive of every resume received.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of open roles, produces a fit assessment, and determines the appropriate disposition — approve for review, deny, or pause pending role reopening.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of manual screening with consistent, criteria-based evaluations delivered instantly for every applicant.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant's name, role, score, disposition, Drive file link, and auto-reply status to a master dashboard, with paused-role candidates routed to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a single source of truth for all hiring activity, so the team always knows where every candidate stands without digging through email or Drive.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is moving along strong — we currently have 56 total agents tracked, with 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While things were quiet on the update front, the completed agents continue running in the background driving real value across email marketing, creator outreach, paid media, SEO, and more. We'll keep pushing forward on the 10 in-progress builds and continue converting planned agents into active development — great momentum heading into the weeks ahead!
